'''nobavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabinosylated|arabinosylated]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-b-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabinosylated|arabinosylated]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nobavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nobavithi|nobavithi]] || [[word:nobaviji|nobaviji]] || [[word:nobavishi|nobavishi]] || [[word:nobaviki|nobaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nobavuthuthu|nobavuthuthu]] || [[word:nobavujuju|nobavujuju]] || [[word:nobavushushu|nobavushushu]] || [[word:nobavukuku|nobavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nobavuthu|nobavuthu]] || [[word:nobavuju|nobavuju]] || [[word:nobavushu|nobavushu]] || [[word:nobavuku|nobavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nobavufthuf|nobavufthuf]] || [[word:nobavufjuf|nobavufjuf]] || [[word:nobavufshuf|nobavufshuf]] || [[word:nobavufkuf|nobavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nobavethe|nobavethe]] || [[word:nobaveje|nobaveje]] || [[word:nobaveshe|nobaveshe]] || [[word:nobaveke|nobaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nobavothotho|nobavothotho]] || [[word:nobavojojo|nobavojojo]] || [[word:nobavoshosho|nobavoshosho]] || [[word:nobavokoko|nobavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nobavotho|nobavotho]] || [[word:nobavojo|nobavojo]] || [[word:nobavosho|nobavosho]] || [[word:nobavoko|nobavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nobavofthof|nobavofthof]] || [[word:nobavofjof|nobavofjof]] || [[word:nobavofshof|nobavofshof]] || [[word:nobavofkof|nobavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfthÃŸf|nobavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfjÃŸf|nobavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfshÃŸf|nobavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfkÃŸf|nobavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|nobavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|nobavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|nobavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|nobavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfthÃŸf|nobavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfjÃŸf|nobavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfshÃŸf|nobavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfkÃŸf|nobavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfthÃŸf|nobavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfjÃŸf|nobavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfshÃŸf|nobavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nobavÃŸfkÃŸf|nobavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nobavÃḊthÃḊ|nobavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:nobavÃḊjÃḊ|nobavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:nobavÃḊshÃḊ|nobavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:nobavÃḊkÃḊ|nobavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nobavathatha|nobavathatha]] || [[word:nobavajaja|nobavajaja]] || [[word:nobavashasha|nobavashasha]] || [[word:nobavakaka|nobavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nobavatha|nobavatha]] || [[word:nobavaja|nobavaja]] || [[word:nobavasha|nobavasha]] || [[word:nobavaka|nobavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nobavafthaf|nobavafthaf]] || [[word:nobavafjaf|nobavafjaf]] || [[word:nobavafshaf|nobavafshaf]] || [[word:nobavafkaf|nobavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nobavasha|nobavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nobavshÃḋsha|nobavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nobavrosha|nobavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nobavmusha|nobavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nobavyasha|nobavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonobavnkshÃḋsha|gonobavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonobavnkrosha|gonobavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonobavnkmusha|gonobavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonobavnkyasha|gonobavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nobabavasha|nobabavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nobabavshÃḋsha|nobabavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nobabavrosha|nobabavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nobabavmusha|nobabavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nobabavyasha|nobabavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonobabavnkshÃḋsha|gonobabavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonobabavnkrosha|gonobabavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonobabavnkmusha|gonobabavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonobabavnkyasha|gonobabavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nebÃḊvasha|nebÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nebÃḊvshÃḋsha|nebÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nebÃḊvrosha|nebÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nebÃḊvmusha|nebÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nebÃḊvyasha|nebÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonebÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|gonebÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonebÃḊvnkrosha|gonebÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonebÃḊvnkmusha|gonebÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonebÃḊvnkyasha|gonebÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nobfavasha|nobfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nobfavshÃḋsha|nobfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nobfavrosha|nobfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nobfavmusha|nobfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nobfavyasha|nobfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonobfavnkshÃḋsha|gonobfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonobfavnkrosha|gonobfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonobfavnkmusha|gonobfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonobfavnkyasha|gonobfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
